evals.prompt: Run the video-consensus skill against a video run directory with two providers and complete cost/timing metadata
evals.expected_output: Three deliverables: consensus-evaluation.txt, provider-comparison-report.md, provider-comparison-report.json with correct provider count and price-speed scoring
assertions: consensus-evaluation.txt exists and contains no markdown formatting
consensus-evaluation.txt does not claim to have watched video
provider-comparison-report.md contains a ranking table with all providers
provider-comparison-report.json contains a providers array with scores

evals.prompt: Run the video-consensus skill against a video run directory where one provider's video file is missing from disk
evals.expected_output: Skill handles missing file gracefully with a warning, still evaluates providers, and generates reports
assertions: warning about missing video file is reported
providers are still scored and ranked
reports are generated successfully despite the missing file

evals.prompt: Run the video-consensus skill against a video run where one provider is missing cost or timing metadata
evals.expected_output: Reports are generated with missing cost or timing receiving neutral component scores
assertions: missing cost receives a costEfficiencyScore of 50
missing timing receives a processingSpeedScore of 50
quality, file-size-efficiency, WER, visual, audio, or video-quality scoring is not used
